description: Hard-prompt benchmark for the robust deterministic assembly/frame generators and dedicated medium-part families. Each case is built end-to-end (deterministic CadQuery, no LLM) and must produce validated, exportable CAD instead of timing out or returning generic decomposition. Asserts classification, design mode, that geometry is generated (not decomposed), validation is not a critical failure, STEP+STL export, and that required components/features exist.

cases.name: machine_frame
cases.prompt: Create a welded steel machine frame 1200mm long, 800mm wide, and 900mm tall using 40mm square tubing. Include four vertical legs, top and bottom rectangular frames, diagonal braces, leveling foot plates with bolt holes, motor mounting plate, and a removable electronics panel.

cases.name: engine_test_stand
cases.prompt: Create a compact engine test stand frame, 1000mm long, 700mm wide, and 800mm tall, using 40mm square steel tubing. Include engine mounting plates, adjustable crossbar, radiator mount, caster wheel plates, fuel tank tray, and diagonal braces.

cases.name: drone_frame
cases.prompt: Create a drone frame for a quadcopter with 450mm motor-to-motor diagonal spacing, four carbon-fiber arms, central electronics plate, battery plate, landing feet, and motor mounting holes on each arm.

cases.name: motorcycle_subframe
cases.prompt: Create a motorcycle rear subframe concept, 850mm long, 350mm wide, and 450mm high, using 25mm steel tubes. Include seat rails, rear shock mount tabs, tail-light bracket, battery tray, side-panel tabs, and triangulated bracing.

cases.name: skateboard_motor_mount_fallback
cases.prompt: Create a full electric skateboard truck and deck mounting assembly with a 700mm deck plate, motor mount bracket, wheel axle supports, belt guard, battery enclosure, controller enclosure, and all mounting holes. If this is too complex, generate the main motor mount bracket first and explain the decomposition.

cases.name: u_bracket
cases.prompt: Create a U-shaped bracket, 80mm wide, 60mm tall, 6mm thick, with two M6 holes on the base and one 8mm pivot hole through each side wall.

cases.name: hinge_bracket
cases.prompt: Create a hinge bracket with a 70mm by 40mm by 6mm base and two side ears, each 30mm tall and 6mm thick, with an 8mm pin hole through both ears.

cases.name: clamp_block
cases.prompt: Create a clamp block for a 25mm round tube with two M6 tightening bolts and four base mounting holes.

cases.name: robotic_arm_base_bracket
cases.prompt: Create a robotic arm base bracket with a 140mm circular base, a vertical support tower 100mm tall, two side gussets, six M6 base mounting holes, and a 52mm bearing pocket.
